prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This decision pertains to regulatory actions under transport licensing laws that apply predominantly to England and Wales. The specific references to statutory sections and provisions suggest that it does not extend to Scotland, which has its own distinct transport regulations.
